name: Fresh Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Tomatoes (About 3 Cups), seeded and chopped
2 tablespoons Lime Juice, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Stir gently until well mixed.
3. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve with tortilla dishes, grilled chicken or hamburger, or tortilla chips.
